steps.t: Legolas believes the three of you should investigate these rumours in the village of Arnach, to the south-west.
Baranor stands in the centre of Arnach, in King's Gondor.
Baranor stands in the centre of Arnach, in King's Gondor.
According to Baranor, some folk of Arnach believe Balakhôr survived the fighting at Pelargir and came ashore south of Arnach.
You found the remnants of an old camp... but how old is it, and who made it?
Gimli has joined you by the camp-fire south of Arnach, in King's Gondor.
Legolas stands deep in thought near the abandoned camp-fire south of Arnach, in King's Gondor.
